H7100.derivation: from an unused root apparently meaning to incise;

H7101.derivation: from H7096 (קָצָה) in the sense of determining;
H7101.strongs_def: a magistrate (as deciding) or other leader
H7101.kjv_def: captain, guide, prince, ruler. Compare H6278 (עֵת קָצִין).

H7105.strongs_def: severed, i.e. harvest (as reaped), the crop, the time, the reaper, or figuratively; also a limb (of a tree, or simply foliage)

H7106.strongs_def: to strip off, i.e. (partially) scrape; by implication, to segregate (as an angle)

H7107.strongs_def: to crack off, i.e. (figuratively) burst out in rage
H7107.kjv_def: (be) anger(-ry), displease, fret self, (provoke to) wrath (come), be wroth.
H7107.usage: wroth(22x), wrath(5x), displeased(3x), angry(2x), angered(1x), fret(1x)

H7110.strongs_def: a splinter (as chipped off); figuratively, rage or strife

H7112.kjv_def: cut (asunder, in pieces, in sunder, off), [idiom] utmost.

H7114.strongs_def: to dock off, i.e. curtail (transitive or intransitive, literal or figurative); especially to harvest (grass or grain)
H7114.kjv_def: [idiom] at all, cut down, much discouraged, grieve, harvestman, lothe, mourn, reap(-er), (be, wax) short(-en, -er), straiten, trouble, vex.
H7114.usage: reap(22x), reaper(8x), shortened(5x), shorter(2x), discouraged(1x), lothed(1x), straitened(1x)

H7116.strongs_def: short (whether in size, number, life, strength or temper)

H7117.strongs_def: a termination (literally or figuratively); also (by implication) a portion; adverbially (with prepositional prefix) after

H7118.strongs_def: {a termination (literally or figuratively); also (by implication) a portion; adverbially (with prepositional prefix) after}

H7119.derivation: contracted from an unused root meaning to chill;

H7121.derivation: a primitive root (rather identical with H7122 (קָרָא) through the idea of accosting a person met);
H7121.strongs_def: to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications)
H7121.kjv_def: bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(-ation), pronounce, publish, read, renowned, say.
H7121.usage: call(528x), cried(98x), read(38x), proclaim(36x), named(7x), guests(4x), invited(3x), gave(3x), renowned(3x), bidden(2x), preach(2x)

H7122.strongs_def: to encounter, whether accidentally or in a hostile manner
H7122.kjv_def: befall, (by) chance, (cause to) come (upon), fall out, happen, meet.

H7123.strongs_def: {to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications)}

H7124.strongs_def: a caller, i.e. partridge (from its cry)

H7125.strongs_def: an encountering, accidental, friendly or hostile (also adverbially, opposite)
H7125.kjv_def: [idiom] against (he come), help, meet, seek, [idiom] to, [idiom] in the way.
H7125.usage: meet(76x), against(40x), come(2x), help(1x), seek(1x), way(1x)

H7126.strongs_def: to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose
H7126.kjv_def: (cause to) approach, (cause to) bring (forth, near), (cause to) come (near, nigh), (cause to) draw near (nigh), go (near), be at hand, join, be near, offer, present, produce, make ready, stand, take.

H7127.strongs_def: {to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose}

H7130.strongs_def: properly, the nearest part, i.e. the center, whether literal, figurative or adverbial (especially with preposition)
H7130.kjv_def: [idiom] among, [idiom] before, bowels, [idiom] unto charge, [phrase] eat (up), [idiom] heart, [idiom] him, [idiom] in, inward ([idiom] -ly, part, -s, thought), midst, [phrase] out of, purtenance, [idiom] therein, [idiom] through, [idiom] within self.

H7133.strongs_def: something brought near the altar, i.e. a sacrificial present

H7134.derivation: perhaps from H6923 (קָדַם) in the sense of striking upon;

H7136.strongs_def: to light upon (chiefly by accident); causatively, to bring about; specifically, to impose timbers (for roof or floor)
H7136.kjv_def: appoint, lay (make) beams, befall, bring, come (to pass unto), floor, (hap) was, happen (unto), meet, send good speed.

H7137.strongs_def: an (unfortunate) occurrence, i.e. some accidental (ceremonial) disqualification

H7138.kjv_def: allied, approach, at hand, [phrase] any of kin, kinsfold(-sman), (that is) near (of kin), neighbour, (that is) next, (them that come) nigh (at hand), more ready, short(-ly).
H7138.usage: near(35x), nigh(13x), neighbour(5x), next(5x), kin(3x), approach(2x), short(2x), kinsfolk(1x), kinsmen(1x)

H7140.strongs_def: ice (as if bald, i.e. smooth); hence, hail; by resemblance, rock crystal

H7141.strongs_def: Korach, the name of two Edomites and three Israelites

H7142.strongs_def: bald (on the back of the head)

H7145.strongs_def: a Korchite (collectively) or descendants of Korach
H7145.kjv_def: Korahite, Korathite, sons of Kore, Korhite.

H7146.strongs_def: a bald spot (on the back of the head); figuratively, a threadbare spot (on the back side of the cloth)

H7151.derivation: from H7136 (קָרָה) in the sense of flooring, i.e.

H7152.strongs_def: Kerioth, the name of two places in Palestine

H7153.derivation: or (with the article interposed) קִרְיַת הָאַרְבַּע; (Nehemiah 11:25), from H7151 (קִרְיָה) and H704 (אַרְבַּע) or H702 (אַרְבַּע); city of Arba, or city of the four (giants);
H7153.strongs_def: Kirjath-Arba or Kirjath-ha-Arba, a place in Palestine

H7154.derivation: from H7151 (קִרְיָה) and H1168 (בַּעַל); city of Baal;

H7155.derivation: from H7151 (קִרְיָה) and the feminine plural of H2351 (חוּץ); city of streets;

H7156.strongs_def: Kirjathaim, the name of two placed in Palestine

H7157.derivation: or (Jeremiah 26:20) with the article interposed; or (Joshua 18:28) simply the former part of the word; or קִרְיַת עָרִים; from H7151 (קִרְיָה) and the plural of H3293 (יַעַר) or H5892 (עִיר); city of forests, or city of towns;
H7157.strongs_def: Kirjath-Jearim or Kirjath-Arim, a place in Palestine

H7158.derivation: or קִרְיַת סֵפֶר; from H7151 (קִרְיָה) and a simpler feminine from the same as H5577 (סַנְסִן), or (for the latter name) H5612 (סֵפֶר); city of branches, or of a book;
H7158.strongs_def: Kirjath-Sannah or Kirjath-Sepher, a place in Palestine

H7160.derivation: a primitive root; to push or gore; used only as denominative from H7161 (קֶרֶן),
H7160.strongs_def: to shoot out horns; figuratively, rays

H7161.strongs_def: a horn (as projecting); by implication, a flask, cornet; by resemblance. an elephant's tooth (i.e. ivory), a corner (of the altar), a peak (of a mountain), a ray (of light); figuratively, power

H7163.derivation: from H7161 (קֶרֶן) and H6320 (פּוּךְ); horn of cosmetic;

H7164.derivation: a primitive root; properly, to protrude; used only as denominative from H7165 (קֶרֶס) (for alliteration with H7167 (קָרַע)),

H7165.strongs_def: a knob or belaying-pin (from its swelling form)

H7166.strongs_def: an ankle (as a protuberance or joint)

H7167.strongs_def: to rend, literally or figuratively (revile, paint the eyes, as if enlarging them)

H7169.strongs_def: to pinch, i.e. (partially) to bite the lips, blink the eyes (as a gesture of malice), or (fully) to squeeze off (a piece of clay in order to mould a vessel from it)

H7170.derivation: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7171 (קֶרֶץ) in the sense of a bit (to 'eat the morsels of' any one, i.e.

H7172.strongs_def: floor (as if a pavement of pieces or tesseroe), of abuilding or the sea
H7172.kjv_def: bottom, ([idiom] one side of the) floor.

H7173.strongs_def: Karka (with the article prefix), a place in Palestine

H7174.strongs_def: Karkor, a place East of the Jordan

H7175.derivation: from an unused root meaning to split off;
H7175.strongs_def: a slab or plank; by implication, a deck of aship

H7176.derivation: from H7136 (קָרָה) in the sense of building;

H7180.derivation: from an unused root (meaning to be hard);
H7180.strongs_def: a cucumber (from the difficulty of digestion)

H7181.strongs_def: to prick up the ears, i.e. hearken
H7181.kjv_def: attend, (cause to) hear(-ken), give heed, incline, mark (well), regard.
H7181.usage: hearken(27x), attend(10x), heed(3x), hear(2x), incline(1x), marked(1x), regarded(1x)

H7182.kjv_def: [idiom] diligently, hearing, much heed, that regarded.

H7184.derivation: or קַשְׂוָה; from an unused root meaning to be round;

H7185.strongs_def: properly, to be dense, i.e. tough or severe (in various applications)
H7185.kjv_def: be cruel, be fiercer, make grievous, be ((ask a), be in, have, seem, would) hard(-en, (labour), -ly, thing), be sore, (be, make) stiff(-en, (-necked)).

H7186.kjv_def: churlish, cruel, grievous, hard((-hearted), thing), heavy, [phrase] impudent, obstinate, prevailed, rough(-ly), sore, sorrowful, stiff(necked), stubborn, [phrase] in trouble.
H7186.usage: hard(5x), roughly(5x), cruel(3x), grievous(3x), sore(2x), churlish(1x), hardhearted(1x), heavy(1x)

H7189.derivation: or קֹשְׁטְ; from an unused root meaning to balance;

H7192.derivation: from an unused root (probably meaning to weigh out);
H7192.strongs_def: an ingot (as definitely estimated and stamped for a coin)

H7193.derivation: by reduplication from an unused root meaning to shale off as bark;
H7193.strongs_def: a scale (of a fish); hence a coat of mail (as composed of or covered with jointed plates of metal)

H7194.strongs_def: to tie, physically (gird, confine, compact) or mentally (in love, league)
H7194.kjv_def: bind (up), (make a) conspire(-acy, -ator), join together, knit, stronger, work (treason).

H7197.derivation: a primitive root; to become sapless through drought; used only as denominative from H7179 (קַשׁ);
H7197.strongs_def: to forage for straw, stubble or wood; figuratively, to assemble

H7198.derivation: from H7185 (קָשָׁה) in the original sense (of H6983 (קוֹשׁ)) of bending;
H7198.strongs_def: a bow, forshooting (hence, figuratively, strength) or the iris
